Otter.ai Review (2026): Pricing, Features & Alternatives

AI meeting assistant that transcribes, summarizes, and extracts action items.

MakerOtter.ai
CategoryAI Productivity Tools, AI Voice & Audio Tools
PricingFree plan available (limited minutes/month); paid plans from $8.33/mo
Free tierYes
WebsiteVisit Otter.ai →

Best for

Teams wanting automatic meeting notes and action items.

Pros

  • Real-time transcription for Zoom, Meet, and Teams
  • Automatic summaries and action-item extraction
  • Usable free tier for occasional meetings

Cons

  • Free tier monthly transcription minutes are limited
  • Accuracy drops with heavy accents or crosstalk

Alternatives to Otter.ai

Gemini

Google's AI assistant, deeply integrated with Search, Gmail, Docs, and Android.

ElevenLabs

AI text-to-speech and voice cloning known for highly realistic voices.

Murf AI

AI voiceover platform aimed at presentations, e-learning, and marketing videos.

Notion AI

AI features built directly into the Notion workspace for notes, docs, and databases.
